title: Modeler API Template Token Source Definition
description: Schema for MODULE.modeler_api.template_tokens.yml files. Each top-level key is a definition ID containing a model_owner and a hierarchical token tree. The first level of children under each token indicator must declare a purpose.

model_owner.description: The model owner plugin ID this definition belongs to.

tokens.description: The top-level token indicators. Each key is an indicator ID.

indicator_token.description: A top-level token indicator. Its direct children must each declare a purpose.

name.description: The human-readable name of the token indicator.

purpose_token.description: A first-level child that declares the purpose for its entire branch.

purpose.description: The purpose of this branch. 'select' for DOM element selection via CSS selectors. 'config' for configuration values.

selector.description: A CSS selector string (only for select-purpose branches). Narrows the DOM selection incrementally from the parent level.

value.description: An optional sample or default value.

token_entry.description: A token entry at any depth below the purpose level.

value.description: An optional sample or default value.

selector.description: A CSS selector string (for select-purpose branches). Each level's selector incrementally narrows the DOM selection within its parent's matched elements.

target.description: A CSS selector used to identify target elements within the matched context. The selector is run within the context element (e.g. a .form-item wrapper) to find the target. The attribute specified in the bracket part of the selector (e.g. [name]) determines which attribute value is extracted as the target identifier. Example: ':is(input, select, textarea)[name]' finds the form element and reads its name attribute.
